sections.heading: Real Questions
sections.text: Real Questions The Stuff You Actually Want to Know No fluff. If you have a question that isn't here, email mikeoller@aitoolinsider.xyz — I answer personally. What do you actually test — and how? ▼ I run every tool in a real workflow before writing a word. For writing tools, I produce actual content. For video tools, I produce actual videos. For automation tools, I run actual pipelines. I list the specific thing I built and the time it took. No sandbox demos. No feature walkthroughs from the marketing page. If something breaks on day 4, I tell you. Do you get paid by the tools you recommend? ▼
